DESCRIPTION.general.scan_timeout: Seconds to wait for an iw scan to complete.
DESCRIPTION.network_summary_columns: List of columns to include in the network summary table.
DESCRIPTION.network_summary_columns.<INDEX>: Configuration for a specific column in the network summary table.
DESCRIPTION.network_summary_columns.<INDEX>.name: Display name for the column.
DESCRIPTION.network_summary_columns.<INDEX>.key: Key to use when storing extracted data for this column.
DESCRIPTION.network_summary_columns.<INDEX>.pattern: Regex pattern to extract data for this column from iw scan output. Should include a capture group for the desired value.
